questions.question: Find the unit vector in the direction of the vector (2√2, 2√2, 0) and express it in the form (a, b, c).
questions.hint: Use the formula for unit vector

questions.question: A particle moves along a curve given by the vector function r(t) = (3t^2, 2t, t). Find the magnitude of the velocity vector at t = 1 hour.
questions.hint: Use the formula for velocity vector

questions.question: Two vectors A and B are given by A = (2, 1, 3) and B = (1, 4, 2). Find the angle between the two vectors using the dot product formula. Give your answer in degrees.
questions.hint: Use the formula for dot product and inverse cosine function
